text:
Dr. Lee
Mr. Anderson Paul 71y
25/3/24

Heart failure NYHA II:
Furosemide 40mg mane
Spironolactone 25mg OD
Bisoprolol 2.5mg OD
Enalapril 10mg BD
Digoxin 0.25mg OD
Warfarin - as per INR

INR weekly, target 2-3
Echo, BNP 3m
Daily wt monitoring
Fluid restrict 1.5L/d
Low Na diet

Dr Lee Cardiology
Emergency if SOB worsens
